Quickstart

Jekyll is static site generator. It takes text written in your favorite markup language and uses layouts to create a static website.

To create a new site, install Jekyll, generate the scaffold, and then build the project locally so you can preview the result before publishing.

  1. Create a new site with jekyll new myblog.
  2. Change into the project directory with cd myblog.
  3. Start the local server with bundle exec jekyll serve.

bundle exec jekyll serve
